response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong general software engineering fundamentals, proven ability to build production systems at scale, and appropriate seniority level, there is a critical gap in domain-specific expertise. The role requires deep experience with experimentation platforms, metrics/telemetry infrastructure, and experimental methodology—none of which appear in the resume. At Principal level, domain expertise in growth/experimentation systems is not optional; it's foundational to the ability to architect frameworks, design guardrails, and lead multi-workstream initiatives.
strengths: 18+ years of production engineering experience with proven ability to ship systems at scale (millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby)
Demonstrates technical breadth and ownership across full stack with expertise in required languages (C, C++, Java, JavaScript, C#)
Clear track record of software craftsmanship, TDD discipline, and mentoring others through workshops and code quality initiatives
concerns: Zero demonstrated experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing infrastructure, feature flags, or metrics/telemetry systems—core to the Principal role
No evidence of collaboration with data science teams on experimental analysis, statistical methodology, or working with metrics/guardrails for rollout risk management
Career trajectory shows technical breadth but lacks deep specialization in distributed systems at global scale or growth/measurement platforms serving multiple teams

key_factors.factor: Limited Evidence of Multi-Region Distributed Systems Work
